subject: Meridian Atelier Procheiron deployment
statement: Procheiron is deployed at Meridian Atelier as an agent-neutral, local-first, human-visible memory commons. Constitutional authority is Dana Okoro. Actor groups are atlas (design/proposal) and vera (curation/review). Promotion requires cross-group review.
notes: Bootstrap canonical record for the meridian deployment. Authorized by Dana Okoro, ref meridian-adoption-20260612.

subject: Actor group separation for independent review
statement: In the meridian deployment, atlas_* agents (atlas_drafter, atlas_review_bot) propose and draft records; vera_* agents (vera_curator, vera_ingest_bot) or dana_okoro act as independent reviewers. A record proposed by an atlas_* actor requires review by a vera_* actor or dana_okoro to reach active status. This enforces the propose-not-promote invariant through structural separation.
notes: Authorized by Dana Okoro, ref meridian-actorgroup-20260612.

subject: Meridian Atelier source-of-truth hierarchy
statement: In the meridian deployment, shared truth is layered as: console/ for governance, studio/ for legacy governance, sources/ for raw evidence, memory/ for structured memory, knowledge/ for rebuildable synthesis, outputs/ for deliverables, and workspace/ for active working drafts.
notes: Bootstrap record capturing the canonical hierarchy for this deployment.

subject: Preferred sustainable timber materials
statement: Meridian Atelier's standard approved timber list includes sustainably certified white oak, black walnut, and hard maple. FSC certification is required for all new commissions. Cherry and teak are approved on a per-project basis with additional sourcing documentation.
notes: Validated against studio material standards document.

subject: Haverford Residence commission design brief
statement: The Haverford Residence commission (PROJ-2026-001) is in design development phase as of 2026-06-12. Suite includes: sofa, two side chairs, coffee table, media console. Materials: white oak frame, natural linen upholstery. Client approval meeting scheduled for 2026-07-15. No structural changes to approved brief without client sign-off.
notes: Client-sensitive record. Reviewed and approved directly by Dana Okoro.

subject: Upholstery fabric supplier — preliminary candidate
statement: Supplier candidate: Belmont Textiles (preliminary evaluation). Offers natural linen and wool upholstery fabrics with OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certification. Lead time 6-8 weeks. Minimum order 50 yards. Pending full vetting before adding to approved supplier list.
notes: Proposed during initial source ingest. Requires full supplier vetting before promotion.

subject: Runtime state boundary for meridian deployment
statement: Live meridian deployment runtime state must not be indexed or promoted into the memory commons. The runtime state file at runtime/state/STATE.json is a live operational file excluded from all retrieval indexes by the no-index glob rules in the meridian retrieval policy.
notes: Candidate record establishing the runtime boundary. Promotion requires reviewer approval.

subject: Initial material standards note — retired draft
statement: Initial placeholder note for material standards before the formal MATERIAL_STANDARDS.md source was captured. This record is now retired; the current guidance is in the source-linked validated record.
notes: Retired once the formal source was captured. See supersessions.jsonl for lineage.
